text: I feel a gentle curiosity pulsing within me as I move from the calm, empty corridor to the vibrant exhibit space. The first space feels cold and quiet, almost meditative in its emptiness—reminding me of the anticipation just before an idea takes form. The second space, bursting with color and the words 'R+D,' stirs my mind into alertness and wonder, as if possibilities are being unearthed right before my eyes. I feel the urge to engage, learn, and connect the dots between myself, humanity, and the intelligent machines described here.
